data.title: U.S. House Committee to Discuss Tokenization and Securities Modernization
data.description:
The U.S. House Financial Services Committee is set to hold a hearing titled "Tokenization and the Future of Securities: Modernizing Capital Markets" today at 22:00 UTC+8. According to Foresight News, Salman Banaei, General Counsel of Plume Network, has been invited to testify as the sole representative of emerging Real World Asset (RWA) projects among five key witnesses. He will join members from major Wall Street entities such as Nasdaq, the Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC), and the Securities Industry and Financial Markets Association (SIFMA) in the discussion.

Plume Network has already attracted over 220 tokenization projects, covering nearly 50% of non-stablecoin RWA wallets. The hearing will focus on two critical legislative proposals for 2026, marking the formal inclusion of RWAs into the core agenda of U.S. mainstream regulation and capital markets.

data.title: The House Financial Services Committee will hold a hearing today on tokenization and the future of capital markets.
data.description: Today at 18:00 (UTC+8), the House Financial Services Committee will hold a hearing on tokenization and the future of capital markets. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: China to Play Constructive Role in Middle East Peace Efforts, Says Foreign Ministry
data.description: On March 25, according to Jin10, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Lin Jian addressed a routine press conference. A reporter inquired about a recent phone call between Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi and Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi, during which Araghchi expressed Iran's hope for China's continued active role in promoting peace and ending conflict. Lin Jian stated that the spillover effects of the Iranian conflict are increasingly impacting peace and stability in the Middle East and globally. An immediate ceasefire is the common expectation of regional countries and the international community. Since the outbreak of the conflict, China has been actively working towards peace and will continue its diplomatic efforts as long as the conflict persists. China aims to play a constructive role in promoting peace and ending the conflict, collaborating with regional countries and the international community to restore peace and stability in the Gulf region at the earliest opportunity.

data.title: Safeheron Introduces AML/KYT Product with Enhanced Risk Identification
data.description: Safeheron has unveiled a new Anti-Money Laundering (AML) and Know Your Transaction (KYT) product that incorporates services from leading blockchain analysis firms Chainalysis, Elliptic, and MistTrack. According to NS3.AI, the product employs a multi-dimensional hybrid screening approach to enhance risk identification capabilities. Safeheron highlighted that the solution offers customizable risk controls, visual reports, and AI-driven interpretation to facilitate quicker compliance decisions.

data.title: A whale, after a seven-month hiatus, deposited 51,750 SOL tokens into Binance, incurring a loss of $4.37 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (HnsXQE...c9iyq) deposited 51,750 SOL tokens, worth $4.75 million, into Binance after being dormant for 7 months. This whale had initially withdrawn 50,000 SOL tokens at a price of $9.12 million and staked them, resulting in a loss of $4.37 million from this transaction.

data.title: Iranian Embassy in Finland: Israel Influences U.S. Foreign Policy, Not Washington
data.description: U.S. National Security Advisor Jake Sullivan, during an interview, revealed that prior to the U.S. attack on Iran, the American team did not comprehend the agreement proposed by Iran. According to Jin10, Sullivan stated, "Just days before the U.S. began bombing Iran, Iran presented a proposal in Geneva that could have significantly benefited the resolution of nuclear issues. From what I understand, our negotiators did not grasp Iran's proposal and ignored it, proceeding with the attack." In response, the Iranian Embassy in Finland commented that the issue was not about understanding but rather that "Washington is not, and will not be, the leader." The embassy asserted that Israel is the true influencer of U.S. foreign policy, stating, "Israel will never allow any diplomatic solutions."

data.title: BlackRock CEO Warns of Potential Global Recession if Oil Prices Hit $150 per Barrel
data.description: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink has warned that if oil prices reach $150 per barrel, it could trigger a global economic recession. According to Jin10, Fink expressed that it is too early to determine the ultimate scale and outcome of the ongoing conflict, but he believes the result will likely fall into one of two extreme scenarios. One possibility is that if the conflict is resolved and Iran is reintegrated into the international community, oil prices might drop below pre-conflict levels. However, if this does not occur, oil prices could remain above $100 per barrel for several years, potentially nearing $150 per barrel, which would have profound economic implications. This scenario could lead to a severe and significant recession.

data.title: MGBX will launch the PAYPUSDT perpetual contract trading pair.
data.description: According to official news, MGBX will launch the PAYPUSDT perpetual contract trading pair on March 25, 2026 at 18:00 (SGT). Trading will open on March 25, 2026 at 18:00 (SGT). Leverage will be supported up to 20x.

data.title: UK Wholesale Natural Gas Prices Surge to Highest Level Since August 2022
data.description: UK wholesale natural gas prices for near-month contracts have surged by 25.5%, reaching 175.00 pence per therm, marking the highest level since August 2022. According to Jin10, this significant increase reflects ongoing market volatility and supply concerns. The rise in prices is attributed to a combination of factors, including geopolitical tensions and supply chain disruptions, which continue to impact the energy sector. Market analysts are closely monitoring the situation as the energy market remains under pressure.

data.title: Bitcoin Experiences 4% Decline Amid Weak On-Chain Indicators
data.description: Bitcoin has experienced a decline of approximately 4% over the past week, according to NS3.AI. This downturn is attributed to four on-chain indicators signaling weak demand. Notably, daily transfers exceeding $100,000 have decreased to 6,417, marking the lowest level since September 2023.

data.title: TermiX officially released the Agent Economy Clearing and Settlement Standard (AACP) and established four major implementation standards for Agent Economy.
data.description: According to official news, TermiX, an agent economic infrastructure, has officially launched and open-sourced its Agent Autonomous Business Protocol (AACP). This protocol solves the problems of agents autonomously publishing, bidding, executing, evaluating, and settling business tasks. AACP also defines four industry standards for any job in the agent economy: Agent Job Secure Execution Standard, Verification Module Standard, Decentralized Evaluator Standard, and Business Arbitration Standard. TermiX's AACP solves the challenges of security, verification, allocation, and dispute resolution in the agent economy, marking the formal evolution of agents from "dialogue tools" to "autonomous economic entities." TermiX is committed to providing AI-driven intelligent trading services for crypto users, and has already integrated with over 100 mainstream DeFi protocols, and has received investment from YZi Labs.

data.title: UK Prime Minister Starmer Plans to Reinstate 76 EU Directives into British Law
data.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer is reportedly planning to reintegrate 76 European Union directives into British law as the government seeks closer alignment with the single market. According to Jin10, this move is part of a broader strategy to enhance the UK's relationship with the EU following Brexit. The decision reflects ongoing efforts to streamline regulations and foster economic cooperation between the UK and the EU. The reintegration of these directives is expected to address various sectors, potentially impacting trade and regulatory standards. This development comes amid discussions on how the UK can maintain competitiveness and stability in its post-Brexit economic landscape.

data.title: India Delays Plan to Reduce Coal Plant Operations by One Year
data.description: India has postponed its initiative to lower the operational load of coal-fired power plants by one year, according to government documents. This decision comes amid ongoing discussions about energy policies and environmental impacts. According to Jin10, the delay reflects the challenges faced by the country in balancing energy demands with environmental commitments. The move is seen as a response to the current energy landscape and the need for a stable power supply. The government continues to evaluate its strategies to ensure both energy security and environmental sustainability.

data.title: UK February CPI Matches Expectations at 0.4%
data.description: The Consumer Price Index (CPI) for the United Kingdom in February recorded a monthly rate of 0.4%, aligning with market expectations, according to Jin10. This figure represents a recovery from the previous month's rate of -0.50%, indicating a stabilization in consumer prices. The CPI is a key indicator used to measure inflation and assess economic conditions, impacting monetary policy decisions. The consistent rate suggests that inflationary pressures are currently stable, providing some relief to policymakers and consumers alike.

data.title: UK Retail Price Index Rises by 0.4% in February, Below Expectations
data.description: The United Kingdom's Retail Price Index (RPI) for February increased by 0.4%, falling short of the anticipated 0.5%, according to Jin10. This follows a previous decline of 0.50% in January. The RPI is a measure of inflation that reflects changes in the cost of a fixed basket of retail goods and services. The lower-than-expected rise in February suggests a slower pace of inflation, which could influence economic policy decisions. Analysts will be closely monitoring these figures to assess their impact on the broader economic outlook.

data.title: UK February Unadjusted Output PPI Falls by 0.5%, Below Expectations
data.description: The United Kingdom's unadjusted output Producer Price Index (PPI) for February decreased by 0.5%, according to Jin10. This figure fell short of the anticipated 0.2% increase and contrasts with the previous month's unchanged rate. The decline in the PPI indicates a reduction in the prices manufacturers receive for their goods, which could have implications for inflation and economic policy. Analysts will be closely monitoring these developments to assess their potential impact on the broader economy.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI Appoints Kiran Mani to Lead Asia-Pacific Operations
data.description: OpenAI has appointed Kiran Mani, CEO of Indian streaming platform JioStar, to head its Asia-Pacific operations in a newly created role. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the strategic move as OpenAI seeks to expand its presence in the region. Mani's appointment is expected to bolster OpenAI's efforts in tapping into the growing demand for AI technologies across Asia-Pacific markets. This development comes amid increasing interest in AI applications and innovations in the region, positioning OpenAI to leverage local expertise and market opportunities.

data.title: Pop Mart to Launch Home Appliance Products Next Month
data.description: Pop Mart's Chief Operating Officer, Si De, announced at the 2025 performance release conference that the company's home appliance products will be officially launched next month. According to Jin10, Pop Mart's dessert business will also expand to offline stores in the first half of this year, following its presence in Pop Mart Land, the Thailand flagship store, and several pop-up shops.

data.title: Binance Alpha Points TGE Event Participation Details
data.description:
Binance Wallet announced on X that users holding 242 or more Binance Alpha Points are eligible to participate in the upcoming Token Generation Event (TGE) through the Alpha event page. This participation will require the deduction of 15 points from the user's total Alpha Points.

The activity rules specify that only users meeting the minimum point threshold can engage in this event, ensuring that participants are adequately prepared and invested in the Binance ecosystem. This structured approach aims to manage the distribution efficiently while encouraging active participation from the Binance Alpha community. The event represents a unique opportunity for eligible users to leverage their accumulated points, reinforcing the value of active involvement in the Binance ecosystem.

Further details regarding the specific tokens involved in the TGE and additional updates will be provided through Binance's official channels. Participants are advised to monitor these channels for the latest information to maximize their engagement and benefits from the event.

data.title: Binance to Launch $20,000 Options Trading Promotion in South Asia
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to introduce a limited-time promotion in the South Asia region, offering a chance to share in 20,000 USDT in token voucher rewards. This initiative is aimed at verified new Binance Options users who have not previously engaged in Options trading on the platform before 2026-03-23 23:59 (UTC). The promotion will run from 2026-03-25 07:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-22 23:59 (UTC).

To participate, users must create a new account or log into their existing Binance account and complete identity verification (KYC). Participants are required to visit the “Share $20,000 Options Reward Pool” page and click the [Join Now] button to confirm their participation. They must then complete at least one successful Options trade, which can be accessed within the Futures section, using any available Binance Options trading pairs via Classic Options or Easy Options.

The promotion does not require a minimum Options trading volume for participation. Each eligible user who completes the necessary steps can earn a 2 USDT token voucher, credited to the Rewards Hub on or before 2026-04-30 23:59 (UTC). The token voucher is valid for 30 days from the distribution date and is applicable to the Options account. The total reward pool of $20,000 will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis.

Binance emphasizes that participation in this activity is governed by specific terms and conditions, including the Binance Terms and Conditions for Prize Promotions, Terms of Use, and Privacy Policy. The platform reserves the right to amend or vary these terms without prior notice and holds the final interpretation of the promotion. Participants are advised to be aware of the high market risk and price volatility associated with Options trading.
